## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss partnership details and strategy for co-selling a "Programmatic SEO" managed service offering](https://fathom.video/share/ePuGwyez6FK-uXy-osyERzy83WFC9pan?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Commitment to invest more resources into the partnership from both sides](https://fathom.video/share/ePuGwyez6FK-uXy-osyERzy83WFC9pan?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Plan to co-brand and co-sell a "Programmatic SEO" managed service offering](https://fathom.video/share/ePuGwyez6FK-uXy-osyERzy83WFC9pan?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [Align on 6-week ramp-up process to demonstrate value and set expectations](https://fathom.video/share/ePuGwyez6FK-uXy-osyERzy83WFC9pan?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)
  - [Explore revenue sharing model based on net costs for each side](https://fathom.video/share/ePuGwyez6FK-uXy-osyERzy83WFC9pan?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)
  - [Leverage Marcel's expertise as the practitioner "face" complemented by DeepGram's product/platform](https://fathom.video/share/ePuGwyez6FK-uXy-osyERzy83WFC9pan?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)

## Topics

### Partnership Overview

  - [Frame as "SEO Ops Managed Engines" - mix of templates, content, human assistance](https://fathom.video/share/ePuGwyez6FK-uXy-osyERzy83WFC9pan?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [DeepGram to go all-in on elevating and investing in the partnership](https://fathom.video/share/ePuGwyez6FK-uXy-osyERzy83WFC9pan?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [Co-build templates, documentation, product marketing, shared content](https://fathom.video/share/ePuGwyez6FK-uXy-osyERzy83WFC9pan?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [DeepGram's core: workflow expertise, tier 2/3 support for Marcel's team](https://fathom.video/share/ePuGwyez6FK-uXy-osyERzy83WFC9pan?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)

### Programmatic SEO Offering

  - [First focus area to partner on a "Programmatic SEO" managed service](https://fathom.video/share/ePuGwyez6FK-uXy-osyERzy83WFC9pan?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Marcel as the practitioner expert voice and service delivery](https://fathom.video/share/ePuGwyez6FK-uXy-osyERzy83WFC9pan?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [Leverage his content, flows, and process templates](https://fathom.video/share/ePuGwyez6FK-uXy-osyERzy83WFC9pan?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [DeepGram's platform, product roadmap, and tier 2/3 support](https://fathom.video/share/ePuGwyez6FK-uXy-osyERzy83WFC9pan?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)

### Delivery Model

  - [For fully-managed, Marcel's team owns day-to-day workflows](https://fathom.video/share/ePuGwyez6FK-uXy-osyERzy83WFC9pan?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [DeepGram handles platform support (T0), advanced workflow assistance (T2/3)](https://fathom.video/share/ePuGwyez6FK-uXy-osyERzy83WFC9pan?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Opportunity to integrate APIs, enhance platform capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/ePuGwyez6FK-uXy-osyERzy83WFC9pan?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Version control for prompts, workspace variables as offerings evolve](https://fathom.video/share/ePuGwyez6FK-uXy-osyERzy83WFC9pan?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)

### Revenue Model

  - [Revenue share net of costs on both sides](https://fathom.video/share/ePuGwyez6FK-uXy-osyERzy83WFC9pan?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)
  - [Incentivizes automation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/ePuGwyez6FK-uXy-osyERzy83WFC9pan?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
  - [Equity arrangement enhancement for Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/ePuGwyez6FK-uXy-osyERzy83WFC9pan?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)

### Next Steps

  - [Outline detailed 6-week ramp-up plan and deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/ePuGwyez6FK-uXy-osyERzy83WFC9pan?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)
  - [Brainstorm full task list for co-branding, product, co-selling motions](https://fathom.video/share/ePuGwyez6FK-uXy-osyERzy83WFC9pan?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
  - [Identify initial customer opportunities to pilot the offering](https://fathom.video/share/ePuGwyez6FK-uXy-osyERzy83WFC9pan?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)
